GB/T 13786一2022
3.3
color temperature
the absolute temperature of the complete radiator when the color of the light source is the same as
the color of the complete radiator at a certain temperature
NOTE The unit is Kelvin (K).
[source: GB/T 5698一2001, 4.88, modified]
3.4
correlated color temperature
the absolute temperature of the complete radiator when the chromaticity point of a light source is
not on the blackbody trajectory, the chromaticity of the light source is closest to the chromaticity of
the complete radiator at a certain temperature，or the color difference distance on the uniform chro-
maticity diagram is the smallest
NOTE The unit is Kelvin (K).
[source: GB/T 5698一2011, 4. 89,， modified]
3.5
color rendering index
measurement of color rendering of light source
NOTE The index is expressed by the consistency level of the color of the tested object under the light source and the
color under the reference light source.
[source: GB/T 5698一2001, 4.77, modified]
3.6
general color rendering index
the average value of the light source”s special color rendering index for the eight colors specified by
CIE
[source: GB/T 5698一2001, 4.79]
2
